title: Air-Conditioning Is in Short Supply as Asia Swelters
summary_full: From classrooms to crowded buses, people across South and Southeast Asia are adjusting to life with less cooling — or none at all — as the war in Iran drives an energy crunch.
summary_public: From classrooms to crowded buses, people across South and Southeast Asia are adjusting to life with less cooling — or none at all — as the war in Iran drives an energy crunch.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: war in Iran drives an energy crunch
